hero.subtitle: / Cross-Registry Audit
hero.description: Revela compares land and real-estate registries for municipalities — surfacing the discrepancies that quietly cost communities tax revenue.
advantages.title: From two spreadsheets — to concrete decisions
advantages.registryDesc: Two registries — one picture. We compare land and estate registries field by field.
advantages.satelliteDesc: We see from space what registries miss. Unregistered buildings, changes on parcels.
advantages.rulesDesc: Every finding is reproducible, auditable, and tied to specific evidence — never a black box.
advantages.priorityDesc: Cases ranked by severity. Officials work top-down on what truly matters.
docs.title: How Revela works
docs.subtitle: Everything you need to know about uploading registries, running audits, and interpreting results.
docs.uploadContent: Upload two registry files (land and real estate) to start an audit. Revela normalizes, cross-references by tax ID, and runs 7 detection rules automatically.
docs.uploadStep1: Upload both registry files (.xlsx, .xls, or .csv, up to 50 MB each)
docs.uploadStep2: Revela normalizes records and builds a cross-reference index by tax ID
docs.uploadStep3: 7 rules fire independently, producing a prioritized list of discrepancies
docs.rulesContent: Each rule targets a specific discrepancy pattern between land and estate registries. Rules fire independently and scores are additive per tax ID.
docs.r01: Active land parcel with terminated estate rights
docs.r02: Agricultural land used for commercial buildings
docs.r03: Land record exists but no matching estate record
docs.r04: Missing or incorrectly formatted tax ID
docs.r05: Duplicate cadastral number or owner-address-area triple
docs.r06: Same tax ID but different owner names across registries
docs.r07: Missing area, address, or owner name in a record
docs.satelliteContent: Enter a cadastral number to check for unregistered structures using satellite imagery and AI. The system compares detected buildings against registry data to identify discrepancies.
docs.formatsContent: Revela accepts Excel and CSV files exported from the State Land Cadastre (DZK) and the State Register of Property Rights (DRPP). Maximum file size is 50 MB per file.
docs.securityContent: All data stays on your server. Files are processed in memory and never leave the deployment environment. Full audit log of every operation. Trembita-compatible authentication.
docs.apiContent: Revela exposes a REST API for programmatic access. Upload files, poll task status, fetch paginated results, and export reports.
docs.ctaDesc: Upload your first pair of registries and see Revela in action.
support.title: How can we help?
support.subtitle: Our team is here to help you get the most out of Revela. Reach out through any channel below.
support.emailDesc: For detailed questions, bug reports, or account issues.
support.chatDesc: Quick questions? Chat with our team in real time.
support.hoursDesc: Our support team is available during business hours.
support.faq1q: What file formats does Revela accept?
support.faq1a: Revela supports .xlsx, .xls, and .csv files exported from DZK (land) and DRPP (real estate) registries. Maximum file size is 50 MB per file.
support.faq2q: How long does an analysis take?
support.faq2a: Most analyses complete in under 60 seconds, even for datasets with tens of thousands of records. You can track progress in real time.
support.faq3a: Yes. All data stays on your server and is processed in memory. We never store or transfer registry data outside your environment. Full audit logging is enabled.
support.faq4a: Yes. You can export discrepancy reports as CSV files directly from the dashboard. PDF export is coming soon.
support.faq5a: Satellite analysis uses AI to identify buildings on a land parcel that are not registered in the estate registry, helping detect unregistered structures.
support.faq6q: How do I add more users?
support.faq6a: The Pilot plan supports 1 user. Upgrade to Standard (5 users) or Enterprise (unlimited) for team access. Contact us for details.
support.formDesc: Describe your issue and we'll get back to you within one business day.
support.sentDesc: We'll respond within one business day. Check your inbox.
upload.title: Upload two registries — we'll find what doesn't match
upload.subtitle: Revela automatically compares land and real estate registries, detects discrepancies, and generates a list of objects for review.
upload.step1Desc: Excel or CSV. Both registries at once.
upload.step3Desc: List of discrepancies with priorities for review.
upload.trust: Data stays on your server · Audit log of all operations · Trembita compatible
satellite.title: Satellite Analysis
satellite.subtitle: Detect unregistered buildings using satellite imagery and AI — Lviv region
satellite.alertDesc: On parcel {{cadastral}} found buildings absent from the real estate registry.
pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your municipality. Start with a free pilot — upgrade when you're ready.
